archetype: Archetype 2 (Performance Pro) mixed with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast)
core_philosophy: A high-end, data-dense trading terminal built for professional discretionary forex traders. Eliminates SaaS fluff, centers around raw technical credibility, absolute data clarity, and elite execution. No soft shadows, no generic gradients.

headings.usage: Landing page heroes, section titles, major metric numbers. Must use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Data tables, axis labels, logs, exact values, UI controls. Never use Inter or generic sans.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Dense, correlated, and strictly aligned. No wasted pixels.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px max) or rounded-none to maintain terminal aesthetic.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-12 gap-4. Single metrics span 3 cols, main charts span 8 or 9 cols, sidebars span 3 or 4 cols.
spacing_and_layout.landing_grid: Bento Grid (Mode A). Asymmetric, wide gaps (gap-8), high visual tension.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Containers use p-4 or p-6. Extreme padding (p-12 to p-24) reserved for marketing landing page sections.

motion.philosophy: Tactical and instant. Feedback must feel mechanical, not floaty.
motion.hover_states: Hard background color shifts (e.g., bg-[#121212] to bg-[#1A1A1A]) rather than vertical translations. 1px borders light up on hover.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-mono text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors rounded-sm px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white hover:border-[#4A4A4A] hover:bg-[#121212] font-mono text-sm rounded-sm px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-[#121212] border border-[#2A2A2A] rounded-sm p-4 h-full flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden
cards.header: flex justify-between items-center mb-4 pb-4 border-b border-[#1E1E1E]
cards.shadows: Absolutely no box-shadows. Depth is created via 1px borders and background contrast.

inputs_and_forms.style: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#2A2A2A] text-white font-mono rounded-sm px-3 py-2 focus:border-[#4A4A4A] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#4A4A4A] outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-[#4A4A4A]

tables.header: text-xs text-tertiary uppercase tracking-wider pb-3 border-b border-[#2A2A2A]

charts.candlestick: Up candles: #00C566 (solid or hollow), Down candles: #FF3B30 (solid). Wicks match body color.
charts.equity_curve: Line chart using pure white #FFFFFF for the line, with a subtle #FFFFFF/10 gradient fill underneath.
charts.axes: Font-mono text-xs text-tertiary. Grid lines should be stroke-[#1E1E1E] stroke-dasharray='3 3'.

sidebar.style: w-64 border-r border-[#2A2A2A] bg-[#0A0A0A] h-screen fixed flex flex-col
sidebar.links: font-mono text-sm text-secondary hover:text-white hover:bg-[#121212] px-4 py-2 mx-2 rounded-sm transition-colors data-[active=true]:text-white data-[active=true]:bg-[#121212]

structure: Hero: Massive Cabinet Grotesk H1. Subtitle in JetBrains Mono. CTA buttons. Background uses pure #0A0A0A with a faint grid overlay (#1E1E1E). No glowing orbs.
Trade Replay Preview: A high-fidelity mockup of the chart interface overlapping the next section to show technical depth.
Features Bento Grid: Asymmetric grid showcasing analytical density, behavioral scoring, and MT5 sync.
Pricing & Social Proof: Monospaced pricing tables, raw data points for social proof (e.g., '14.2M trades logged').

app_shell.structure: Fixed left sidebar (64px collapsed, 256px expanded) with Phosphor icons. Topbar for global context (Account switcher, connect broker status, balance overview) with glassmorphism (bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#2A2A2A]).

structure: KPI Row (Top): 4 cards (Balance, Equity, Margin, Behavioral Score). Large Cabinet Grotesk numbers.
Main Row: Equity Curve Chart (col-span-8) + Behavioral Insights/Drawdown stats (col-span-4).
Bottom Row: Recent Deals Table (dense, full width) showing Ticket, Symbol, Type, Volume, Open/Close Price, P&L.
Win Rate & Profit Factor: Donut charts using Volt Green and Electric Blaze.
Distributions: Bar charts/Histograms for P&L by Day of Week, Session (Asian/London/NY), and R-Multiple.
Drawdown Curve: Area chart highlighting underwater periods in red.

chart_replay_page.structure: Split screen. Left 70%: Full interactive candlestick chart (TradingView style) with entry/exit markers. Right 30%: Journal note panel, trade metadata, tagging system, and psychological state selector.

landing_hero_chart.description: Candlestick chart visual for landing page hero or feature mockups.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure you use 'Cabinet Grotesk' from a custom CDN/fontsource or fallback to a highly structured sans if unavailable, and 'JetBrains Mono' for all data, tables, and UI text.
ICONS: Install and use '@phosphor-icons/react' (duotone or regular) for sharp, technical icons that fit the terminal aesthetic.
TAILWIND CONFIG: Add the custom colors (background.app -> #0A0A0A, etc.) directly into your theme configuration to ensure exact adherence to the Tactical Swiss Terminal palette.
SHADCN CUSTOMIZATION: Remove all default rounded corners (change to rounded-sm or rounded-none). Remove all box shadows (shadow-sm, shadow-md). Rely purely on 1px borders (#2A2A2A) for separation.
DATA ATTRIBUTES: Add data-testid to every button, chart container, table row, and input for testing.
FILE EXTENSIONS: The project uses Next.js with App Router. When creating components, use .js (or .jsx) files per user instructions.
